The '''Galaanus system''' was in the [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="R" /> Also known as the '''Galaan system''', it contained the planets [[Corva]]<ref name="SN" /> and [[Galaan/Legends|Galaan]]. It was two hours hyperspace travel from the [[Jaresh system/Legends|Jaresh system]].<ref name="R" />
